name: Breath of Fire
description: Capcom's fantasy JRPG series centered on recurring heroes named Ryu, dragon transformations, party-based exploration, and clan-based worlds.

eras.title: Classic JRPG Era
eras.description: The first four games define the series through traditional party-based JRPG structure, dragon transformations, and recurring mythos.

eras.title: Experimental Era
eras.description: Dragon Quarter and later revival attempts move the series away from its traditional format.
